name: spt-vision-tester
description: Local-only SPT offline UI tests with target-monitor Computer Use and validated scenarios.

interface.shortDescription: Debug local SPT on a target monitor.
interface.longDescription: SPT Vision Tester launches configured local SPT components, binds windows to a selected monitor, supports Computer Use sessions and bounded scenarios, captures evidence, and stops only recorded processes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use spt-vision-tester for a target-monitor local SPT offline visual test.
